Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Adessa]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Adessa is Leah's older sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Adessa carries the Bleeding Wand, an artifact of Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Adessa wields the Bleeding Wand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Adessa is the daughter of King Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Adessa attempted to assassinate King Zakareth in his throne room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Adessa is a Ragnarus Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Adessa was exiled to the Territory of Lirial by King Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Adessa has been exiled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Talos compares Leah and Zakareth to Adessa.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Adessa is described as having a shrewd strategic mind and a keen grasp of politics.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
